languages.text: "Вы посмели заключить под стражу Камиллу Драйвстем! Она — наша соратница. Годы и положение дают ей право говорить с Себерианом довольно прямо. Вы лишили нас столь необходимой поддержки!"

traits.locale_text: "Вы посмели заключить под стражу Камиллу Драйвстем! Она — наша соратница. Годы и положение дают ей право говорить с Себерианом довольно прямо. Вы лишили нас столь необходимой поддержки!"

languages.text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"
languages.original_text: "Вы посмели заключить под стражу Камиллу Драйвстем! Она — наша соратница. Годы и положение дают ей право говорить с Себерианом довольно прямо. Вы лишили нас столь необходимой поддержки!"

traits.locale_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

"You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

"You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

languages.text: “你竟敢逮捕卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔！她是我们的盟友。凭她的资历和地位，完全有资格对塞贝里安直言相谏。你害我们痛失最紧缺的助力！”
languages.original_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

traits.locale_text: “你竟敢逮捕卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔！她是我们的盟友。凭她的资历和地位，完全有资格对塞贝里安直言相谏。你害我们痛失最紧缺的助力！”

languages.text: « Vous avez eu l'audace de faire arrêter Camilla Drivestem ! Elle fait partie de nos alliés. Son âge et sa position lui donnent le droit de s'adresser directement à Seberian. Vous nous avez privés d'un soutien dont nous avions grand besoin ! »
languages.original_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez eu l'audace de faire arrêter Camilla Drivestem ! Elle fait partie de nos alliés. Son âge et sa position lui donnent le droit de s'adresser directement à Seberian. Vous nous avez privés d'un soutien dont nous avions grand besoin ! »

languages.text: "Camilla Drivestem'i tutuklatma cüretini gösterdiniz! O bizim müttefikimiz. Yaşı ve konumu ona Seberian ile doğrudan konuşma hakkı veriyor. Bizi çok ihtiyacımız olan bir destekten mahrum bıraktınız!"
languages.original_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

traits.locale_text: "Camilla Drivestem'i tutuklatma cüretini gösterdiniz! O bizim müttefikimiz. Yaşı ve konumu ona Seberian ile doğrudan konuşma hakkı veriyor. Bizi çok ihtiyacımız olan bir destekten mahrum bıraktınız!"

languages.text: «¡Ha tenido la osadía de arrestar a Camilla Drivestem! Es nuestra aliada. Su edad y su puesto le otorgan el derecho de hablar directamente con Seberian. ¡Nos ha arrebatado un apoyo vital!».
languages.original_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Ha tenido la osadía de arrestar a Camilla Drivestem! Es nuestra aliada. Su edad y su puesto le otorgan el derecho de hablar directamente con Seberian. ¡Nos ha arrebatado un apoyo vital!».

languages.text: "Ihr hattet die Dreistigkeit, Camilla Drivestem unter Arrest zu stellen. Sie ist unsere Verbündete. Sie hat aufgrund ihres Alters und ihrer Position das Recht, vergleichsweise offen mit Seberian zu sprechen. Ihr habt uns einer dringend benötigten Unterstützung beraubt!"
languages.original_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr hattet die Dreistigkeit, Camilla Drivestem unter Arrest zu stellen. Sie ist unsere Verbündete. Sie hat aufgrund ihres Alters und ihrer Position das Recht, vergleichsweise offen mit Seberian zu sprechen. Ihr habt uns einer dringend benötigten Unterstützung beraubt!"

languages.text: 「カミリア・ドライブスチームを逮捕する胆力があったのか！彼女は我々の同盟者だ。彼女の年齢と立場は、シベリアに直接話しかける権利を与えている。我々は、必要不可欠な支援を失ったのだ！」
languages.original_text: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"

traits.locale_text: 「カミリア・ドライブスチームを逮捕する胆力があったのか！彼女は我々の同盟者だ。彼女の年齢と立場は、シベリアに直接話しかける権利を与えている。我々は、必要不可欠な支援を失ったのだ！」
